description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Feature CI that runs on push and pull request events, excluding the main branch for push events. The workflow should have three jobs: linux, macos, and windows. The linux job should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix of different compiler images, the macos job on a macos-latest environment with a matrix of Xcode versions, and the windows job on a windows-latest environment. Each job should check out the code, create a build directory, configure, build, and test a project using CMake and CTest.
